description: Introduce a StorageBackend trait in orchestrator-core that abstracts the current FileServiceHub JSON file operations. The trait should cover: task CRUD, workflow CRUD, requirement CRUD, decision record storage, checkpoint read/write, and atomic writes. Current FileServiceHub becomes the JsonFileBackend implementation. This is the foundation for swapping in SQLite/Postgres without changing service logic. Keep the trait async and use anyhow::Result. Do not change any existing behavior — this is a pure refactor extracting the interface.
title: Add pluggable storage backend trait abstracting over JSON-on-disk persistence
